headline: Fourier Transform
description: The Fourier Transform (Joseph Fourier, 1807) decomposes a signal into its constituent frequencies. It is fundamental to signal processing, image compression (JPEG), audio processing (MP3), and MRI reconstruction. FFT (Fast Fourier Transform, Cooley-Tukey 1965) reduces complexity from O(n²) to O(n log n).

citation.name: The Fourier Transform and Its Applications (4th Edition, 2025)
citation.author: Bracewell R.N.

citation.name: FFT Algorithms: From Cooley-Tukey to Modern GPU Implementations (2025 Survey)
